page_content:
MUSC832 Doctoral Seminar in Music Literature (3 Credits)

An analytical survey of the literature of music: keyboard music; vocal music; string music; wind instrument music.

Prerequisite: MUSC831.

Restriction: Permission of ARHU-School of Music department. MUSC878 Advanced Composition (3 Credits)

Conference course in composition in the larger forms.

Prerequisite: MUSC678; or students who have taken courses with comparable content may contact the department.
